title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
